notes: v0.15.4 — MODULES screen redesign. Library tiles are now HEX badges in a 4-column grid with rarity shown as a glowing dot (text never overflows). Slot picker is a SIDE DOCK that slides in from the right while the ship blueprint stays visible behind it. COSMETICS rebuilt as 4 tabs (SHIP / PROJECTILE / TRAIL / SHIELD) with a live composite preview that uses the real in-game render — ship texture, projectiles streaming up with the active shape + color, fading trail circles in active_trail_color(), and a pulsing shield ring in active_shield_color(). Click any skin in the right-hand list and the preview updates instantly. Bug fixes: rarity badges never overflow, slot X-button has a bigger hit area and swallows clicks before drag, library single-click equips, filter-chip count badges sit inside the chip. Windows only.
